response.justification: Maria Rodriguez demonstrates strong full-stack and tooling experience with a focus on web and mobile technologies, but her background lacks direct alignment with the embedded networking and security requirements of the role. While she has C/C++ experience and Linux familiarity, her recent work does not emphasize low-level firmware, security protocols, or Layer-2/3 networking, which are critical for this position.
strengths: Extensive software development experience (10+ years) with a track record of leading projects and teams.
Proficiency in C/C++ and Linux, including contributions to a C IDE (National Instruments) and system-level tools.
Strong problem-solving skills and experience with test-driven development and cross-functional collaboration.
concerns: No demonstrated experience with embedded firmware, security protocols (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X), or switch/networking technologies.
Lacks native-level Japanese proficiency (required) and has only basic German, which may hinder collaboration.
Recent work focuses on web/mobile (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than low-level systems or hardware integration.
